message:
feat(demo-showcase): add action timeline, log search screens and expand demos

Demo showcase application enhancements:

**New Screens:**
- action_timeline.rs: Interactive timeline visualization of actions
- log_search.rs: Searchable log viewer demonstration

**Screen Updates:**
- notifications.rs: Integrate expanded toast notification system
- responsive_demo.rs: Improved responsive layout demonstrations
- widget_gallery.rs: Showcase new widget capabilities

**App & Infrastructure:**
- app.rs: Route new screens, update view enum
- cli.rs: Add CLI options for new screens
- mod.rs: Export new screen modules
- theme.rs: Theme refinements for new screens

**Cargo.toml:**
- Update dependencies for new features

These screens demonstrate the full range of FrankenTUI's
interactive capabilities for developers building TUI apps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,8 @@ SCREENS:
    12  Markdown           Rich text and markdown rendering
    13  Visual Effects     Animated braille and canvas effects
    14  Responsive         Breakpoint-driven responsive layout demo
+   15  Log Search         Live log search and filter demo
+   16  Notifications      Toast notification system demo
 
 KEYBINDINGS:
     1-9, 0          Switch to screens 1-10 by number

@@ -88,14 +88,9 @@ impl ResponsiveDemo {
             bps.xl,
         );
 
-        let style = Style::new()
-            .fg(theme::fg::PRIMARY)
-            .bg(bp_color(bp))
-            .bold();
+        let style = Style::new().fg(theme::fg::PRIMARY).bg(bp_color(bp)).bold();
 
-        Paragraph::new(&*indicator)
-            .style(style)
-            .render(area, frame);
+        Paragraph::new(&*indicator).style(style).render(area, frame);
     }
 
     fn render_main_content(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {
@@ -105,19 +100,20 @@ impl ResponsiveDemo {
         let bp = self.current_breakpoint();
 
         // Responsive layout: single column on small, sidebar+content on medium+
-        let layout = ResponsiveLayout::new(
-            Flex::vertical().constraints([Constraint::Fill]),
-        )
-        .at(
-            Breakpoint::Md,
-            Flex::horizontal().constraints([Constraint::Fixed(28), Constraint::Fill]),
-        )
-        .at(
-            Breakpoint::Lg,
-            Flex::horizontal()
-                .constraints([Constraint::Fixed(28), Constraint::Fill, Constraint::Fixed(24)]),
-        )
-        .with_breakpoints(self.breakpoints());
+        let layout = ResponsiveLayout::new(Flex::vertical().constraints([Constraint::Fill]))
+            .at(
+                Breakpoint::Md,
+                Flex::horizontal().constraints([Constraint::Fixed(28), Constraint::Fill]),
+            )
+            .at(
+                Breakpoint::Lg,
+                Flex::horizontal().constraints([
+                    Constraint::Fixed(28),
+                    Constraint::Fill,
+                    Constraint::Fixed(24),
+                ]),
+            )
+            .with_breakpoints(self.breakpoints());
 
         let result = layout.split_for(bp, area);

         let chunks = Flex::vertical()

-                Constraint::Fill,

             .split(area);
 
         self.render_info_block("Layout Info", &self.layout_info_text(), frame, chunks[0]);
